---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load


```{r load}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(glue)
  library(SeuratWrappers)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggpubr)
  library(stringr)
  library(data.table)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
})
```

## Including Plots


### Batch 1


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
adt = Read10X("batch1/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/")

# 创建 Seurat 对象
obj <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = adt$`Gene Expression`,  # RNA 矩阵
  assay = "RNA"
)

# 添加 ADT 数据
mtx = as.matrix(adt$`Antibody Capture`)
obj[["ADT"]] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = mtx)

# The [[ operator can add columns to object metadata. This is a great place to stash QC stats
obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = "^MT-")
obj[["percent.rb"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = "^RP[SL]")
trqwe::mcsaveRDS(obj, "eCROP/multi/batch1/seurat.rds")
```


## Batch 2 

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
adt = Read10X("batch2/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/")


# 创建 Seurat 对象
obj <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = adt$`Gene Expression`,  # RNA 矩阵
  assay = "RNA"
)

# 添加 ADT 数据
mtx = as.matrix(adt$`Antibody Capture`)
obj[["ADT"]] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = mtx)


# The [[ operator can add columns to object metadata. This is a great place to stash QC stats
obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = "^MT-")
obj[["percent.rb"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = "^RP[SL]")
trqwe::mcsaveRDS(obj, "eCROP/multi/batch2/seurat.rds")
```


## merge two batch

```{R}
obj1 = trqwe::mcreadRDS("eCROP/multi/batch1/seurat.rds")
obj2 = trqwe::mcreadRDS("eCROP/multi/batch2/seurat.rds")

obj = merge(obj1, obj2)
obj = JoinLayers(obj)

trqwe::mcsaveRDS(obj, "eCROP/multi/seurat.rds")
```



### QC


```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=6}
plot_dir = "eCROP/multi/batch2/plots"
dir.create(plot_dir, showWarnings = F)

VlnPlot(obj, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3, pt.size = 0)
VlnPlot(obj, features = c("nFeature_ADT", "nCount_ADT", "percent.rb"), ncol = 3, pt.size = 0)
```


```{R}
obj <- subset(obj, subset = nFeature_RNA > 0 & nFeature_RNA < 7500 & nCount_RNA < 5e4 & percent.mt < 5 & percent.rb < 20)

VlnPlot(obj, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3, pt.size = 0)
VlnPlot(obj, features = c("nFeature_ADT", "nCount_ADT", "percent.rb"), ncol = 3, pt.size = 0)
```



```{R fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
library(harmony)

DefaultAssay(obj) <- "RNA"
obj <- FindVariableFeatures(obj)

VariableFeaturePlot(obj)

obj <- ScaleData(obj)
obj <- RunPCA(obj)

obj = RunHarmony(obj, "batch")

ElbowPlot(obj, reduction = "harmony")


obj <- RunUMAP(obj, dims=1:10, reduction.name = "umap", reduction = "harmony")
obj <- FindNeighbors(obj, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:10)
 obj <- FindClusters(obj, resolution = 3, graph.name = "RNA_nn")

# 可视化
p = DimPlot(obj, reduction = "umap", group.by = "cells", label = T, cols = colors) + NoLegend()

p1 = DimPlot(obj, cells.highlight = rownames(obj@meta.data)[obj@meta.data$batch == 1]) + NoLegend() + labs(title = "batch 1")
p2 = DimPlot(obj, cells.highlight = rownames(obj@meta.data)[obj@meta.data$batch == 2]) + NoLegend() + labs(title = "batch 2")

p + p1 + p2
```



## Cell type annotation


```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=15}
markers = list(
  "LMPP"=c("SPNS3", "SMIM24", "HOPX", "SPINK2"),
  "Gran"=c("AZU1", "ELANE", "CTSG", "MPO", "FUT4"),
  "Mono"=c("LYZ", "VCAN", "FCN1", "CSF1R", "CD14", "FCGR3A"),
  "EBMP"=c("GATA2", "HDC", "RNASE2", "PRG2", "CLC"),
  "MEP"=c("GATA1", "TAL1", "KLF1", "GYPA"),
  "EryP"=c("TFRC", "BCL11A"),
  "Ery"=c("HBB", "AHSP", "APOC1", "CTNNBL1"),
  "MK"=c("PF4", "GP9", "ITGA2B"),  # "PLEK", 
  "mDC"=c("CD1C", "CLEC9A", "CD141"),
  "pDC"=c("CLEC4C", "LILRA4"),
  "ProPreB"=c("RAG1", "RAG2", "IGL11", "VPREB1"),
  "NaiveB"=c("IGHM", "IGHD", "MS4A1", "CD19", "CD79A"),
  "Mast"=c("CMA1", "TPSAB1", "MS4A2", "KIT")
)

lvls = c(
  "LMPP", "EBMP", "MEP", "EryP", 
  "BFU-E", "CFU-E", "ProEry", "Ery",
  "MK", "Mast", "Neu", "Gran", "pDC", "mDC", 
  "Mono", "Macro", "ProPreB", "NaiveB",
  "MSC"  #, "unknown1"
)
lvls = c(lvls, as.character(sort(unique(obj@meta.data$seurat_clusters))))
obj@meta.data$cells = factor(obj@meta.data$cells, levels = lvls)


ordered_in_lvls <- markers[lvls[lvls %in% names(markers)]]
not_in_lvls <- markers[!names(markers) %in% lvls]
ordered_not_in_lvls <- not_in_lvls[sort(names(not_in_lvls))]
markers <- c(ordered_in_lvls, ordered_not_in_lvls)

p = DotPlot(
  obj, assay = "RNA", group.by = "cells",
  features = as.vector(unlist(markers)),
) +
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 90, vjust = .5, hjust = 1))

p
```


```{R fig.height=5, fig.width=10}

cell_markers <- c(
  "CD34", "CD38", "CD45RA",  
  "CD235ab", "CD36", "CD105",  
  "CD41", "CD61", "CD19", "CD10", "CD20", 
  "CD14", "CD33", "CD11b",  
  "CD11c", "CD141", "CD303", "CD304", "CD123", 
  "CD15", "CD66b", "CD16",  "CD117"
)

obj@assays$ADT@counts = obj@assays$ADT@counts[, rownames(obj@meta.data)]

obj@meta.data$cells = factor(obj@meta.data$cells, levels = intersect(levels(obj@meta.data$cells), unique(obj@meta.data$cells)))

p = DotPlot(
  obj, assay = "ADT", 
  features = as.vector(unlist(cell_markers)), 
  group.by = "cells", 
  col.max=1.5, col.min=-1.5,
  dot.min = 0, dot.scale = 6
) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = .5, hjust = 1))

p
```


### sgRNA results

```{R fig.height=5, fig.width=4}
df = list(
  as.data.frame(fread("eCROP/multi/batch1/sgrna_stats.csv.gz", col.names = c("name", "barcode", "umi", "gene", "sgrna", "seq"))),
  as.data.frame(fread("eCROP/multi/batch2/sgrna_stats.csv.gz", col.names = c("name", "barcode", "umi", "gene", "sgrna", "seq")))
)
df[[1]]$barcode = paste0(df[[1]]$barcode, "_1")
df[[2]]$barcode = paste0(df[[2]]$barcode, "_2")

df = do.call(rbind, df)

df = df %>%
  filter(df$gene != "") %>%
  group_by(barcode, gene) %>%
  add_tally() %>%
  dplyr::select(barcode, gene, n) %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.data.frame()

df = reshape2::dcast(df, gene~barcode, value.var = "n", fun.aggregate = sum, fill = 0)
rownames(df) = df$gene
df = df[, colnames(df) != "gene"]


mtx = as.data.frame(matrix(0, nrow = nrow(df), ncol = nrow(obj@meta.data)))
rownames(mtx) = rownames(df)
colnames(mtx) = rownames(obj@meta.data)

mtx[rownames(df), intersect(colnames(df), colnames(mtx))] = df[, intersect(colnames(df), colnames(mtx))]


obj[["STC"]] = CreateAssayObject(counts = mtx)
DefaultAssay(obj) = "STC"
obj = NormalizeData(obj)


DefaultAssay(obj) = "STC"
obj = ScaleData(obj)

genes = rownames(obj@assays$STC_t@data)
genes = genes[genes != "STC"]


plist = lapply(c("STC", genes), function(i) {
  umap = as.data.frame(obj@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings)
  umap$value = obj@assays$STC_t@data[i, rownames(umap)]

  color_pal = c("lightgrey", "yellow", "red")
  if (i == "STC") {
    color_pal = c("white", "#D5E5F2FF", "#A9D2DC", "#4575b4") # c("lightgrey", "blue")
  }
  umap = umap[order(umap$value, decreasing = T), ]
  p = ggplot(umap, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, z=value)) +  # 去掉 color=value
    stat_summary_hex(bins = c(30, 30), fun = "mean", na.rm = T) +  # 修正 bins 语法
    # gradient_fill("YlOrRd") +
    labs(title = i) +
    theme_pubr()
  
  
  if (i == "STC") {
    p = p + scale_fill_gradientn(
      name = "Cell count",
      colors = color_pal,
      limits = c(0, 1.5),  # 根据你的数据范围调整
      values = scales::rescale(c(0, .2, 1.5)),
      oob = scales::squish,
      na.value = "lightgrey"
    )
  } else {
    p = p + scale_fill_gradientn(
      name = "Cell count",
      colors = color_pal,
      values = scales::rescale(c(0, .2, 1)),
      limits = c(0, 1),  # 根据你的数据范围调整
      oob = scales::squish,
      na.value = "lightgrey"
    )
  }
  
  p
})

cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plist, nrow = 7)
```




```{R fig.height=12, fig.width=16, eval=FALSE}
df = list(
  as.data.frame(fread("eCROP/multi/batch1/sgrna_stats_sgrna.csv.gz")),
  as.data.frame(fread("eCROP/multi/batch2/sgrna_stats_sgrna.csv.gz"))
)

df[[1]]$barcode = paste0(df[[1]]$barcode, "-1_1")
df[[2]]$barcode = paste0(df[[2]]$barcode, "-1_2")

df = do.call(rbind, df)
df = df[df$barcode %in% rownames(obj@meta.data), ]

# 修改后的selectGuide函数
selectGuide <- function(data, barcode) {
  # data是分组后的数据框
  # barcode是当前分组的barcode值
  
  # 确保data是数据框
  data <- as.data.frame(data)
  
  # 如果数据为空，返回NULL
  if(nrow(data) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # 获取非零值
  vals <- sort(data$value, decreasing = TRUE)
  
  # 情况1：所有值都为0
  if(all(vals == 0)) {
    return(data.frame(
      gene = data$gene,
      value = data$value,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  # 情况2：有多个最大值，且都是同一个基因
  max_val <- vals[1]
  max_rows <- data[data$value >= max_val, ]
  
  if(nrow(max_rows) > 1) {
    if(length(unique(max_rows$gene)) == 1) {
      return(data.frame(
        gene = max_rows$gene[1],
        value = max_val,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
  
  # 情况3：最大值远大于其他值的和
  if(length(vals) > 1 && max_val >= sum(vals[2:length(vals)]) * 3) {
    return(data.frame(
      gene = max_rows$gene[1],
      value = max_val,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  # 默认返回NULL
  return(NULL)
}


# 使用group_modify而不是group_map
df_result <- df %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    result <- selectGuide(.x, .y$barcode)
    if(is.null(result)) {
      # 返回空数据框，但保持结构一致
      return(data.frame(
        gene = character(0),
        value = numeric(0),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
    return(result)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
# 转换为普通数据框
df_result <- as.data.frame(df_result)


df_result = reshape2::dcast(df_result[df_result$gene != "", ], gene~barcode, value.var = "value", fun.aggregate = mean, fill = 0)
rownames(df_result) = df_result$gene
df_result = df_result[, colnames(df_result) != "gene"]
df_result = df_result[, intersect(colnames(df_result), rownames(obj@meta.data))]
```



```{r}
df = na.omit(df)

# 统计基本值
calculate_sgrna_stats = function(df_result, cols = "cells") {
  temp = reshape2::melt(as.matrix(df_result))
  temp = temp[temp$value > 0, ]
  temp$cells = as.character(obj@meta.data[as.character(temp$Var2), cols])
  
  temp1 = as.data.frame(table(unique(temp[temp$Var1 != "STC", c("cells", "Var2")])$cells))
  
  temp = temp %>%
    group_by(Var1, cells) %>%
    add_tally() %>%
    dplyr::select(Var1, cells, n) %>%
    unique() %>%
    reshape2::dcast(cells~Var1, value.var = "n", fun.aggregate = sum, fill = 0) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  temp = merge(temp, temp1, by.x = "cells", by.y = "Var1")
  rownames(temp) = temp$cells
  temp[, colnames(temp) != "cells"]
}

# 检查是否显著
check = function(temp, cells, genes) {
  a = temp[cells, genes]
  b = sum(temp[, genes])

  c = temp[cells, "STC"]
  d = sum(temp[, "STC"])
  
  # 1. 构建列联表 (Contingency Table)
  # 沿用你上一轮问题中的例子：
  # 行是“细胞类型”（目标簇 vs. 其他），列是“gRNA类型”（目标基因 vs. STC）
  # 假设数据如下：
  #                目标簇   其他簇
  # 目标基因gRNA       a        b
  # STC对照gRNA        c        d

  contingency <- matrix(c(a, b - a,
                          c, d - c),
                        nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  p = fisher.test(contingency)
  print(glue::glue("{c}: {p$p.value} {p$estimate}; a={a}; b={b}; c={c}; d={d}"))
}


temp = calculate_sgrna_stats(df_result, cols = "cells")
```


```{r fig.height=5, fig.width=10}
res = lapply(rownames(temp), function(cell) {
  res = lapply(colnames(temp)[!colnames(temp) %in% c("STC", "Freq", "Total")], function(gene) {
    a = temp[cell, gene]
    b = sum(temp[, gene])
    
    c = temp[cell, "STC"]
    d = sum(temp[, "STC"])
    
    contingency <- matrix(c(a, b - a,
                            c, d - c), 
                          nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
    p = fisher.test(contingency)
    data.frame(gene=gene, cell=cell, p_val = p$p.value, odd_ratio = p$estimate, pos_in_targets=a, pos_total=b, ctrl_in_targets=c, ctrl_total=d)
  })
  do.call(rbind, res)
})
res = do.call(rbind, res)
rownames(res) = NULL
res$log2od = log2(res$odd_ratio)

res = res %>%
  group_by(cell) %>%
  mutate(padj=p.adjust(p_val, method = "none")) %>%
  as.data.frame()


res = res %>%
  filter(pos_in_targets > 0) %>% # padj < 0.05 & 
  group_by(cell) %>%
  mutate(N = sum(pos_in_targets)) %>%
  mutate(sig.perc = pos_in_targets / N) %>%
  as.data.frame()


tfs = list(
  Novel=c(
    "ZNF875", "ZNF706", "ZNF555", "ZNF512", "ZNF431", "ZNF385D", "ZNF207",
    "ZBTB8A", "ZBTB16", "THYN1", "TFDP2", "TCF7L2", "STAT5", "SMYD3", 
    "SCMH1", "SALL4", "POU2AF1", "PA2G4", "NR3C1", "NME2", "MLXIP",
    "MEF2A", "MAFF", "IRF5", "HOXA6", "HMGN3", "HMGA1", "GTF3A",
    "ELK3", "ELK1", "E2F2", "DRAP1", "CSRNP1", "CHCHD3", "AHDC1" 
  ),
  Known=c(
     "RIOK2", "RUNX3", "KLF1", "GATA1", "GATA2", "TAL1", "LEF1", "CEBPE", "SPI1", "HOXA7"
  )
)


res = res[res$gene %in% unlist(tfs), ]
res$gene = factor(res$gene, levels = rev(unique(as.character(unlist(tfs)))))
res$group = ifelse(
  res$gene %in% tfs$Novel,
  "Novel", "Known"
)
res$cell = factor(res$cell, levels = rev(sort(unique(obj@meta.data$cells))))


p = ggscatter(
  res[!res$cell %in% c("pDC", "ProPreB", "NaiveB", "mDC", "Mast"), ], x="gene", y="cell",
  color="log2od", size="sig.perc"
) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = .5)) +
  scale_color_gradientn(
    name="log2(OR)",
    colours=c("#3300cc","#4157A4","white","#FF3333","#CC0000"),
    limits = c(-2, 2),
    oob = scales::squish
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), range = c(1, 6)) +
  facet_grid(.~group, scales = "free_x", space="free") +
  labs(x = "", y="")

p
```


S17

```{R fig.height=5, fig.width=10}
temp = reshape2::melt(as.matrix(df_result))
temp$cell = obj@meta.data[temp$Var2, "cells"]
temp = temp[temp$value != 0 & temp$Var1 != "STC", ]

temp = temp %>%
  group_by(Var1) %>%
  add_tally() %>%
  dplyr::select(Var1, n) %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.data.frame()


p = ggbarplot(
  temp, x="Var1", y="n", fill="#598BB8", color = NA
) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = .5),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black",  # 边框颜色
                                fill = NA,        # 不填充
                                linewidth = 1)    # 边框粗细
  ) +
  labs(y = "Number of cells", x="") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed")

p
```


```{R}
temp = reshape2::melt(as.matrix(df_result))
temp$cell = obj@meta.data[temp$Var2, "cells"]
temp = temp[temp$value != 0, ]

temp = data.frame(
  group = c("STC", "TF-targeting sgRNAs", "Not detected"),
  value = c(
    sum(temp$Var1 == "STC"), 
    sum(temp$Var1 != "STC"),
    ncol(obj) - nrow(temp)
  )
)
temp$freq = glue::glue("{round(temp$value / sum(temp$value) * 100, digits = 2)}%")

p = ggpie(
  temp, "value", label = "freq", fill = "group",
  color = "white",
  palette = c("lightgrey", "#f08e7e", "#2572a9"),
  lab.pos = "in", lab.font = "black"
) + labs(fill = "")

p
```




```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=10}
df_result = reshape2::dcast(df_result[df_result$sgrna != "", ], sgrna~barcode, value.var = "value", fun.aggregate = mean, fill = 0)
rownames(df_result) = df_result$sgrna
df_result = df_result[, colnames(df_result) != "sgrna"]

temp = reshape2::melt(as.matrix(df_result))
temp$cell = obj@meta.data[temp$Var2, "cells"]
temp = temp[temp$value != 0, ]
temp = temp[temp$value != 0 & str_detect(temp$Var1, "STC"), ]

temp = temp %>%
  group_by(cell, Var1) %>%
  add_tally() %>%
  dplyr::select(cell, Var1, n) %>%
  unique() %>%
  group_by(Var1) %>%
  mutate(p = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
  as.data.frame()

temp$Var1 = factor(temp$Var1, levels = paste0("STC_", 1:15))


temp = lapply(unique(temp$cell), function(x) {
  stcs = unique(temp$Var1)
  temp = temp[temp$cell == x, ]
  
  stcs = stcs[!stcs %in% temp$Var1]
  
  if (length(stcs) > 0 ) {
    temp = rbind(temp, data.frame(cell=x, Var1=stcs, n=0, p=0))
  }
  temp
})

temp = do.call(rbind, temp)

p = ggbarplot(
  temp, x="cell", y="p", fill="Var1", color=NA,
  position = position_dodge2(),
  ggtheme = theme_pubr(legend = "right")
) + labs(
  fill = "",
  x="", y="Cell proportion (%)"
) +
  paletteer::scale_fill_paletteer_d("RColorBrewer::Paired")


p
```



```{R}
library(corrplot)

mtcars = reshape2::dcast(temp, Var1~cell, value.var = "p", fill = 0, fun.aggregate = mean)
rownames(mtcars) = mtcars$Var1
mtcars = mtcars[, colnames(mtcars) != "Var1"]
```



```{R fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
library(corrgram)
library(RColorBrewer)


# 使用计数器追踪面板位置
n_vars <- nrow(mtcars)

panel_counter <- 0

panel.pts.simple.ticks <- function(x, y, ...) {
    # 绘制散点
    panel.pts(x, y, ...)
    
    # 更新计数器
    panel_counter <<- panel_counter + 1
    
    # 获取当前面板的用户坐标范围
    usr <- par("usr")
    
    # 计算当前面板的行列（假设下三角按列填充）
    # 按行填充计算行和列
    # 对于下三角，每行有 (行号-1) 个面板
    # 找到当前计数器对应的行
    row_idx <- 1
    total_in_previous_rows <- 0
    
    while(panel_counter > total_in_previous_rows + (row_idx - 1)) {
        total_in_previous_rows <- total_in_previous_rows + (row_idx - 1)
        row_idx <- row_idx + 1
    }
    
    # 列索引 = 当前行内的第几个面板 + 1
    col_idx <- panel_counter - total_in_previous_rows
    # cat(glue::glue("{panel_counter}: {row_idx} {col_idx}\n\n"))
    
    # 获取实际数据的范围
    x_range <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    y_range <- range(y, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # 只在最左侧添加y轴刻度（第一列）
    if(col_idx == 1) {
        axis(2, at = pretty(range(y), n = 3), cex.axis = 0.7, 
             col = "gray50", col.axis = "black", las = 1)
    }
    
    # 只在最底部添加x轴刻度（最后一行）
    if(row_idx == n_vars) {
        axis(1, at = pretty(range(x), n = 3), cex.axis = 0.7,
             col = "gray50", col.axis = "black")
    }
}


# 自定义shade面板 - 带相关性数值
panel.shade.with.cor <- function(x, y, cor.method = "pearson", ...) {
    # 计算相关系数
    cor_val <- cor(x, y, method = cor.method, use = "complete.obs")
    # print(cor_val)  # 打印查看实际值
    
    # 获取当前面板的用户坐标
    usr <- par("usr")
    
    # 将cor_val映射到颜色索引
    # 你的数据范围是0.95-1.0，我们专门针对这个范围做映射
    if(cor_val >= 0.95) {
        # 0.95-1.0 映射到 1-200
        color_idx <- round((cor_val - 0.95) / 0.05 * 199) + 1
        color_idx <- max(1, min(200, color_idx))
    } else {
        # 低于0.95的用最浅色
        color_idx <- 1
    }
    
    fill_color <- my_colors[color_idx]
    
    # 绘制填充矩形
    rect(usr[1], usr[3], usr[2], usr[4], 
         col = fill_color, border = "gray80", lwd = 0.5)
    
    # 添加相关性数值
    text(mean(usr[1:2]), mean(usr[3:4]), 
         sprintf("%.3f", cor_val),  # 显示3位小数，因为你的数据很接近
         cex = 1.2, 
         col = ifelse(cor_val > 0.98, "white", "black"),  # 0.98以上用白字
         font = 2)
}

var_names <- rownames(mtcars)  # 获取变量名作为标签


# 自定义调色板 - 针对0.95-1.0的高相关性
custom_palette_high_cor <- function(n = 200) {
    # 定义关键点的颜色 (针对你的数据范围0.95-1.0)
    # 让颜色在0.95-1.0之间有丰富的变化
    key_points <- c(0.95, 0.96, 0.97, 0.98, 0.99, 1.0)
    key_colors <- c(
      "#ffffcc",  # 0.95: 浅黄
      "#ffeda0",  # 0.96: 黄
      "#fed976",  # 0.97: 橙黄
      "#feb24c",  # 0.98: 橙
      "#fd8d3c",  # 0.99: 橙红
      "#f03b20"   # 1.00: 红
    )
    
    # 创建插值函数
    color_func <- colorRamp(key_colors, space = "rgb")
    
    # 生成从0.95到1.0的等间隔序列
    t <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n)
    rgb_colors <- color_func(t) / 255
    rgb(rgb_colors[,1], rgb_colors[,2], rgb_colors[,3])
}


# 创建调色板生成器
my_colors <- custom_palette_high_cor(200)


corrgram(
  t(mtcars),
  main="",
  lower.panel = panel.pts.simple.ticks,
  upper.panel = panel.shade.with.cor,  # 使用自定义面板,
  diag.panel = panel.density,
  order = F, labels = NULL,
  outer.labels = list(
     top = list(            # 底部外侧标签
         labels = var_names,
         cex = 1.2,             # 字体大小
         srt = 0,               # 旋转45度
         adj = c(.5, -.5)                  # 对齐方式
     ),
     right = list(               # 左侧外侧标签
         labels = var_names,
         cex = 1.2,
         srt = 0,                # 不旋转
         adj = c(0, 0)            # 对齐方式
     )
 )
)
```


Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
